---
title: "CEIC Data"
page-layout: article
---

# CEIC Data

## Description

Global economic and financial database containing macroeconomic, sector, regional, and alternative data from official and commercial sources. Supports comparative economic and policy research.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics, Government & Public Policy
- **Data/resource type:** Financial & Market Data, Data Platform
- **Access model:** Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Financial & Market Data, Data Platform

## Links

- [Access resource](https://library.yale.edu/eresources/access/access-ceic-data)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
